categoryDescription: Core navigation and sign-in flows for the storefront.

skills.description: Load the dashboard and confirm the primary UI regions render.
steps: Wait for the page network activity to settle
Verify the HOME button is visible
Verify the filters panel is visible
Verify the product grid is visible
skills.expectedResult: Dashboard loads with the HOME button, filters panel and product grid all visible.

steps: Enter the email into the email field
Enter the password into the password field
Wait for redirect to the dashboard
skills.expectedResult: User is authenticated and redirected to the dashboard.

skills.skillName: Add a product to the cart
skills.description: Add a single product and confirm the cart count increments.
steps: Locate the target product card by name
Click Add to Cart on that product
Verify the product appears in the cart
skills.expectedResult: The selected product is added and the cart count increments by one.
